name: red_herb
description: A weak medicinal herb which heals wounds.

name: yellow_herb
description: A valuable medicinal herb which efficiently heals wounds.

name: white_herb
description: A valuable medicinal herb which greatly heals wounds.

name: blue_herb
description: A very valuable medicinal herb whose unique aroma gratifies one's spirit.

name: green_herb
description: A valuable medicinal herb which counteracts the effects of poison.

name: apple
description: A round, edible fruit that, when eaten once a day, keeps the doctor away.

name: banana
description: A sweet tasting tropical fruit made famous by its use in slapstick comedy and practical jokes.

name: grape
description: Clustered berries with smooth skin that can be fermented to make wine.

name: carrot
description: An orange root that is supposedly good for your vision. Despite the Beta Carotene, kids don't care much for it.

name: potato
description: A tuber that can be fried, baked, boiled mashed, even eaten.

name: meat
description: A leg of meat that's been cooked to near perfection.

name: honey
description: A sweet product made by bees that is endowed with yummy flavor and medicinal uses.

name: milk
description: Pasteurized and bottled cow milk that is chock full of bovine goodness.

name: hinalle_leaflet
description: Leaf cut from a Hinalle Plant which has a cool, fresh scent. It can ease pain and reinvigorate.

name: aloe_leaflet
description: Leaf cut from an Aloe plant.

name: mastela_fruit
description: A shiny, purple fruit picked from the boughs of the Mastela tree.

name: holy_water
description: Blessed water used in sacred ceremonies.

name: panacea
description: A mystic remedy for all illnesses.

name: royal_jelly
description: Highly nutritious jelly secreted from honeybees that they only feed to larvae and future queens.

name: monster_s_feed
description: Processed food that is normally fed to monsters.

name: candy
description: A confection of sugar, chocolate and other flavorings. Kids love it!

name: candy_cane
description: A striped cane of peppermint candy. Sugar daddies love it!

name: apple_juice
description: Bottled apple juice that's easy to digest.

name: banana_juice
description: Bottled banana juice that's easy to digest.

name: grape_juice
description: Bottled grape juice that's easy to digest.

name: carrot_juice
description: Bottled carrot juice that's easy to digest.

name: pumpkin
description: A large orange fruit grown from a vine that's used in baking pies and a few other dishes.

name: ice_cream
description: Deliciously frosty ice cream that can cause brain freeze if you eat too much too quickly.

name: pet_food
description: Sterilized food that has been fortified with vitamins and minerals. Some Cute Pets will feed on this.

name: well_baked_cookie
description: A warm, scrumptious cookie.

name: piece_of_cake
description: A sweet slice of cake covered in icing and topped with a cherry.

name: raw_fish
description: A raw, fresh fish.

name: rice_cake
description: A snack made out of rice that doesn't contain any fat. Some women love having this snack.

name: sushi
description: An Eastern delicacy, in which various types of raw fish is placed on top of rice. The rice is marinated in vinegar then wrapped in dried seaweed.

name: bao
description: A type of dough that is filled with grinded meat, usually served hot. People living in eastern countries have enjoyed eating this food for a long time.

name: mochi
description: A tasty rice cake made for celebrating the Lunar New Year.

name: traditional_rice_cake
description: A type of food that is made of rice powder. There are many recipes to make this food, all of them absolutely delicious.

name: chocolate
description: Fried and grinded Cacao that is solidified with Milk and cacao paste. Delicious and bittersweet.

name: hand_made_chocolate
description: A collection of chocolates that are gathered and arranged to make a beautiful item. This is often used in courtship, and sometimes even used effectively.

name: handmade_white_chocolate
description: White chocolate which is used to propose to a girl by a boy during White Day.

name: white_chocolate
description: A white cacao.

name: rice_ball
description: A lump of rice which can be eaten for lunch.

name: tom_yum_goong
description: A type of soup wich is regarded as one of the three famous soups in the world. It has a spicy, sweet and sour taste with shrimps, lemons and chilees.

name: shrimp
description: A shellfish which has a long tail and many legs. When cooked, the color of body changes into red and its flesh is very tasty with a unique scent.

name: lemon
description: A bright yellow fruit with very sour juice and a fresh scent.

name: lucky_candy
description: Candy which is rumored to bring luck to whoever eats it.

name: lucky_candy_cane
description: A candy cane which is rumored to bring luck to whoever eats it.

name: lucky_cookie
description: A cookie which is rumored to bring luck to whomever eats it.

name: chocolate_drink
description: A kind of drink made from chocolate and milk from one of the Royal Court Dessert Specialist's recipes. Although the Dessert Chef wishes for people to drink this treat elegantly, it's usually gulped down, enjoyed with hand sloppily placed on the waist.

name: egg
description: An egg from a bird. It's full of nutrition, making it an ideal food for growing children.

name: bag_of_grain
description: Dried grains that are commonly used in the cuisines of many countries.

name: strawberry
description: A red berry that is renown for its slightly sweet and sour taste, and is  best eaten fresh.

name: fresh_fish
description: A fresh fish that can be cooked in a variety of ways.

name: bread
description: Freshly leavened bread that gives off a wholesome scent.

name: edible_mushroom
description: An edible mushroom that can be eaten raw or cooked.

name: orange
description: A sweet citrus fruit that can be eaten raw, juiced, or cooked as a jam.

name: caviar_pancake
description: A pancake topped with caviar. Average people have trouble telling the difference between fine caviar and common frog spawn eggs.

name: jam_pancake
description: A pancake topped with strawberry jam. This looks much more delicious than plain strawberries alone.

name: honey_pancake
description: A very sweet pancake topped with honey.

name: sour_cream_pancake
description: A pancake in which sour cream is one of the main ingredients. Biting into just once will make your eyeswater.

name: mushroom_pancake
description: A pancake made with mushrooms that has a light taste that everyone seems to like.

name: cute_strawberry_choco
description: A strawberry that is supposed to be covered in a smooth layer of chocolate, but whoever made this botched it up. It's not perfect, but this was made with love, if not skill.

name: lovely_choco_tart
description: A tart covered in a smooth layer of rich chocolate that is the perfect dessert for romantic dinners.

name: fly_wing
description: An enchanted fly's wing that instantly sends its user to a random spot when waved in the air.

name: butterfly_wing
description: An enchanted butterfly's wing that instantly sends its user to his Save Point when waved in the air.

name: old_blue_box
description: A mysterious blue box that seems to hold something inside, but you'll have to open it to find out.

name: dead_branch
description: A twig which contains the mysterious power of eternity. It can summon a living creature...

name: anodyne
description: A medicine made from grinded Mint that is used to ease pain and relax muscle tension. It's a popular painkiller because of its potency.

name: aloevera
description: A basic herbal emollient made from Aloe extract. Despite its stench and sour taste, it's addictive if regularly eaten.

name: yggdrasilberry
description: Fruit from the Yggdrasil tree which brings life to our world. Its fantastic taste is full of life.

name: yggdrasil_seed
description: Seed from the Yggdrasil tree which holds our world together. It has a weird, energizing pungence.

name: amulet
description: A forbidden talisman that can reanimate the dead, resulting in a walking corpse or undead zombie.

name: yggdrasil_leaf
description: Leaf from the Yggdrasil tree which maintains the mortal coil. It can bring life to fallen characters.

name: magnifier
description: A magnifying glass used for scrutinizing objects.

name: mini_furnace
description: A disposable, miniature blast furnace that can be easily carried. Used to manufacture metals.

name: iron_hammer
description: A disposable hammer made out of well-tempered steel. Necessary tool in crafting Level 1 Weapons.

name: golden_hammer
description: A disposable hammer made out of pure gold. Necessary tool in crafting Level 2 Weapons.

name: oridecon_hammer
description: A disposable hammer made out of Oridecon. Necessary tool in crafting Level 3 Weapons.

name: old_purple_box
description: An old purple box holding contents that are a mystery until it is opened.

name: worn_out_scroll
description: A rolled up piece of parchment, now brittle with age, on which faded text can scarcely be read.

name: unripe_apple
description: An apple that isn't ripe enough for humans to eat. Poring finds it to be very tasty.

name: orange_juice
description: A small bottle of orange juice. Drops finds it to be very tasty.

name: bitter_herb
description: An herb that is too bitter for the human palate. Poporing finds it to be very tasty.

name: rainbow_carrot
description: A fragrant carrot colored with all the hues of the rainbow. Lunatic finds it to be very tasty.

name: earthworm_the_dude
description: A rather suave looking earthworm gifted with womanizing debonairness. Picky finds him to be quite delicious.

name: rotten_fish
description: A rotting, dirty fish that attracts flies. Chonchon finds it to be very tasty.

name: rusty_iron
description: A rusty piece of iron that would only interest scavengers and vermin. Steel Chonchon finds it to be very tasty.

name: monster_juice
description: A fetid drink made of monster blood. Hunter Fly finds it to be very tasty.

name: sweet_milk
description: Sweet, luscious, full bodied milk. Savage Bebe finds it to be very tasty.

name: well_dried_bone
description: A tough, chewy bone that has been dried in the sun. Baby Desert Wolf finds it to be very tasty.

name: singing_flower
description: A flower that has been miraculously blessed with the gift of song. Rocker is inexplicably drawn to its sweet melodies.

name: dew_laden_moss
description: A dewy, green moss that grows in cool places. Spore finds it quite delectable.

name: deadly_noxious_herb
description: A plant that contains poisons that would harm most living creatures. Poison Spore is known to savor its flavor.

name: fatty_chubby_earthworm
description: An earthworm that stopped caring about its figure years ago. Peco Peco loves the way that it tastes.

name: sweet_potato
description: A baked sweet potato with an appetizing scent. Smokie loves eating this.

name: tropical_banana
description: A premium quality banana grown in the tropics. Yoyo finds it irresistable; forever will it be his one weakness.

name: orc_trophy
description: A trophy awarded tothe bravest of Orcs. Orc Warriors are compelled to claim it as their very own.

name: no_recipient
description: An old, heartfelt letter that has never been delivered since it has no recipient. Munak is inexplicably drawn to this item.

name: old_broom
description: A generations old broom that is handed down within a family. Dokebi is drawn to it for some reason.

name: silver_knife_of_chastity
description: A silver knife that is a symbol of a virgin's chastity. Sohee loves collecting these.

name: armlet_of_obedience
description: A fancy, intricately decorated bracelet. Isis is lured by its regal beauty.

name: shining_stone
description: A stone that softly glimmers with faint light. Petite is drawn to its gentle sparkle.

name: contract_in_shadow
description: A contract drawn in darkness. Deviruchi is compelled to claim this item as its own.

name: book_of_the_devil
description: A forbidden book in which the secret for summoning high level demons is detailed. Baphomet Jr. cannot resist its power.

name: pet_incubator
description: A portable incubator that is used to hatch Cute Pet monster eggs.

name: gift_box_plain
description: A box that contains some sort of present.

name: union_of_tribe
description: A symbol of solidarity that evokes a feeling of nobility to those who see it.

name: her_heart
description: An old book rumored to be enchanted by a girl whose name has been forgotten with time. For some reason, Bongun is drawn to it.

name: forbidden_red_candle
description: A candle that may have a mysterious purpose.

name: soft_apron
description: A soft apron that is double stitched for better quality. Favorite item of the Alice monster.

name: authoritative_badge
description: A badge made out of bronze that was used in an ancient asian country. It was given to government officials who went on business trips and they could use this badge to rent horses anywhere.

name: korean_rice_cake
description: This is a popular food in traditional Korean festivals. It's made by filling a woven straw, cone shaped container with rice, and then pine needles are used to cover it.

name: gift_box_red
description: A box which contains a gift.

name: gift_box_yellow
description: A box which contains a gift.

name: gift_box_blue
description: A box which contains a gift.

name: gift_box_green
description: A box which contains a gift.

name: red_envelope
description: A red envelope which is given to children on New Year's Day. It seems to contain something that will make its recipient very happy.

name: poison_bottle
description: A skeleton shaped bottle which contains deadly poison.

name: pilule
description: An herbal medicine from an old eastern country that is rumored to cure every illness.

name: magic_carnation
description: A carnation which is given to parents or teachers on special occassions.

name: sweet_memory_of_marriage
description: A picture album of memories of the wedding ceremony or honeymoon.

name: distilled_fighting_spirit
description: A magical drink which increases attack strength when it is taken.

name: durian
description: A tropical delicacy known as the king of fruits. It's big, green and heavy, and is covered in thorns. Its odor may offend some people, but it tastes delicious.

name: level_3_earth_spike
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_5_earth_spike
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_3_cold_bolt
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_5_cold_bolt
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_3_fire_bolt
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_5_fire_bolt
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_3_lightening_bolt
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_5_lightening_bolt
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_3_soul_strike
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_5_soul_strike
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_1_fire_ball
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_5_fire_ball
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_1_fire_wall
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_5_fire_wall
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: level_1_frost_diver
description: A spell scroll which was made by the essence of ancient magic.

name: ora_ora
description: A trap that uses sticky, sweet scented liquid to lure and ensnare Thief Bugs. Handy if bugs are totally infesting a home.

name: animal_gore
description: Bottled blood from a freshly slain beast. It's usually used to  lure other animals.

name: hinalle
description: A common plant with a mildly curative effect, its leaves can give a nice and smoothing sensation.

name: aloe
description: A rare plant with curative properties that only grows deep in the forest during certain times of the year.

name: clover
description: A plant with three heart shaped leaves that is plentiful in meadows.

name: four_leaf_clover
description: An extremely rare clover with four leaves. Legends say that merely holding a Four Leaf Clover is a sign of great fortune to come.

name: singing_plant
description: A mysterious plant that sings melancholic songs under a full moon. Legend says it's a woman grieving over the loss of her lover that has been reborn.

name: ment
description: A white flower containing oils that can relieve pain and aches. Strangely, only a few remember how to use it to cause memory loss.

name: izidor
description: A powerful hallucinogen once ground and eaten, the growing of Izidor has been prohibited because of its awesome addictiveness.

name: illusion_flower
description: Rarely seen by humans, this flower supposedly shines brilliantly under the light of the moon.

name: shoot
description: A delicate and fragile plant that is still in the early stages of growth.

name: flower
description: An ordinary, thornless wildflower that doesn't have any particular scent.

name: empty_bottle
description: An empty bottle that can be used for carrying liquid.

name: emperium
description: Merely owning this gloriously resplendent gem is said to be a sign of being chosen by fate to wield great power.

name: yellow_gemstone
description: An enchanted crystal that is used in conjuction with certain magic spells. Once used, it is powerless and immediately destroyed.

name: red_gemstone
description: An enchanted crystal that is used in conjuction with certain magic spells. Once used, it is powerless and immediately destroyed.

name: blue_gemstone
description: An enchanted crystal that is used in conjuction with certain magic spells. Once used, it is powerless and immediately destroyed.

name: garnet
description: A dark red jewel that is the birthstone for people born in January.

name: amethyst
description: A purple jewel that is the birthstone for people born in February.

name: aquamarine
description: A clear, sky blue jewel that is the birthstone for people born in March.

name: emerald
description: A brilliant, green jewel that is the birthstone for people born in May.

name: pearl
description: A pink jewel that is the birthstone for people born in June.

name: ruby
description: A deep maroon jewel that is the birthstone for people born in July.

name: cursed_ruby
description: A ruby containing mysterious powers.

name: sardonyx
description: An onyx with alternating brown and white bands of sard. It's the birthstone for people born in August.

name: sapphire
description: A dark blue gem that is the birthstone for people born during September.

name: opal
description: A gem displaying an array of brilliant colors that is the birthstone for people born in October.

name: topaz
description: A golden gem that is the birthstone for people born in November.

name: zircon
description: A dazzling white-blue gem that is the birthstone for the month of December.

name: 1carat_diamond
description: A small, twinkling and transparent gem that can be sold at a good price.

name: 2carat_diamond
description: A medium size, sparkling transparent gem that can be sold at a high price.

name: 3carat_diamond
description: A huge, dazzling gem that can be sold at an outrageous price.

name: cracked_diamond
description: A damaged diamond with obvious imperfections that won't sell for much zeny.

name: red_frame
description: A red frame that would make a nice present.

name: chung_jah
description: Ancient Korean porcelain made of blue ceramic and crafted by a true master.

name: china
description: A clean, white plate crafted by a Chinese master. It's a nice present for the ladies.

name: black_ladle
description: A black colored ladle, made out of an especially strong glowing material.

name: pencil_case
description: A case for containing pencils. It'd be a nice gift for artists, writers, students and the like.

name: rouge
description: Make-up for rich women that is made of extracts from plants and animals. When applied to the skin, it shines in a lustrous, attractive red color.

name: puppet
description: A cute cotton doll that's a favorite for little girls.

name: poring_doll
description: A doll made to resemble a Poring monster. Everyone likes it for its cuteness.

name: chonchon_doll
description: A doll made in the image of a Chonchon monster. Most people feel a little repulsed by this doll...

name: spore_doll
description: A doll that looks just like a Spore monster.

name: bouquet
description: A bunch of flowers that is given to express love, thanks or appreciation.

name: wedding_bouquet
description: A small bouquet thrown by brides during the wedding ceremony. The single woman who catches it is the next to be married, supposedly.

name: glass_bead
description: A toy for young boys that's sort of like a marble. But not really.

name: crystal_mirror
description: A gorgeous mirror made with polished crystal that is considered an essential for every woman.

name: witherless_rose
description: A symbol of eternal love, this enchanted rose will never wither. However, it is rare and expensive.

name: frozen_rose
description: Sculpted out of ice by masters in the Arctic, this unique and beautiful rose makes a great gift.

name: baphomet_doll
description: A doll made to resemble Baphomet, enemy of all that is righteous. It is a dollmaker's masterpiece.

name: osiris_doll
description: A doll made to resemble Osiris, king of darkness. Without a doubt, it is a dollmaker's masterpiece.

name: rocker_doll
description: A doll made to resemble Rocker, the grasshopper that loves to play its violin in the fields.

name: yoyo_doll
description: A doll made to resemble one of the Yoyos. These intelligent monkeys live in groups and are very familiar with humans.

name: racoon_doll
description: A doll made to resemble Smokie, the racoon that possibly has the power of invisibility.

name: rough_oridecon
description: Raw ore that mostly consists of Oridecon metal.

name: rough_elunium
description: Raw ore that mostly consists of Elunium metal.

name: daenggie
description: A braided pigtail that has been cut from the head of a young girl.

name: tree_root
description: Some roots from trees can be used as medicine, but most of them are fibrous enough to be used as rope.

name: reptile_tongue
description: Merely a severed reptile's tongue.

name: scorpion_tail
description: A tail severed from a scorpion.

name: stem
description: Some stems from plants can be used to in making certain medicines.

name: pointed_scale
description: A single scale from a Worm Tail monster.

name: resin
description: A viscous plant substance used in the production of certain types of goods.

name: spawn
description: Frog eggs.

name: jellopy
description: A small crystallization created by some monsters.

name: garlet
description: A small crystallization created by some monsters.

name: scell
description: A small crystallization created by some monsters.

name: zargon
description: A small crystallization created by some monsters.

name: tooth_of_bat
description: Farmiliar's sharpened tooth.

name: fluff
description: A clump of monster fur and fuzz that can be used to make thread and fabric.

name: chrysalis
description: Skin from a larva that has been shed or peeled off.

name: feather_of_birds
description: A bird's feather that can be used in decor or in fabric creation.

name: talon
description: A sharp talon from a bird's foot.

name: sticky_webfoot
description: A webbed foot cut from a monster's hind leg.

name: animal_skin
description: Animal hide that can be used in making clothes, coverings or beddings.

name: wolf_claw
description: A claw severed from a wolf's paw.

name: mushroom_spore
description: A spore discharged from a mushroom.

name: orc_s_fang
description: A cuspid wrenched out of from a gruesome Orc's jaw.

name: evil_horn
description: Baphomet's horn is a symbol representing evil.

name: powder_of_butterfly
description: Butterfly wing powder that sparkles with the power of fantasy.

name: bill_of_birds
description: A bird's beak. Waste not want not.

name: snake_scale
description: Scales from a snake that can be used to make some rather flamboyant clothes.

name: insect_feeler
description: Antennae that serve as sense organs for insects.

name: immortal_heart
description: A heart which will never stop beating. It contains some sort of dreadful power.

name: rotten_bandage
description: Old, dirty bandage that's so soiled, it's almost worthless.

name: orcish_voucher
description: A small sculpture that serves as the token for every true Orc Warrior.

name: skel_bone
description: A bone taken from an Undead skeleton.

name: memento
description: A box that is buried with the dead. It contains gems and someone's mementos...

name: shell
description: A hard shell that used to protect a monster.

name: scale_shell
description: A shell-like piece of tough monster skin that is covered with hard scales.

name: venom_canine
description: A sharp, poisonous fang from a monster.

name: sticky_mucus
description: Mysteriously sticky liquid.

name: bee_sting
description: A stinger from a hornet or bee.

name: grasshopper_s_leg
description: A Rocker's hind leg.

name: nose_ring
description: A ring placed in a cow's nose so that it can be steered more easily.

name: yoyo_tail
description: A prehensile tail from a Yoyo.

name: solid_shell
description: A solid, durable shell taken from a monster.

name: horseshoe
description: A "U" shaped piece of iron fitted on a horse's hoof for its protection.

name: raccoon_leaf
description: A leaf that gives Smokies the power to change form and become invisible.

name: snail_s_shell
description: A hard, spiral shaped shell used by Snails.

name: horn
description: Hard and sharp horn from a monster's head.

name: bear_s_footskin
description: A lazy bear's foot that supposedly has a unique flavor and the power to restore male vigor.

name: feather
description: A feather that boasts full, lustrous barbs used for making clothes of the highest quality.

name: heart_of_mermaid
description: The heart of a mermaid.

name: fin
description: A fish monster's fin.

name: cactus_needle
description: A sharp needle from a Muka cactus monster.

name: stone_heart
description: A heart constructed entirely out of stone.

name: shining_scale
description: A shimmering, reflective scale.

name: insect_peeling
description: Shed skin from worms and insects.

name: gill
description: Part of a fish's breathing apparatus.

name: decayed_nail
description: A putrid, incredibly pungent corpse's nail.

name: horrendous_mouth
description: A complete set of corpse's teeth. Well, as complete as it can get.

name: stinky_scale
description: A nasty scale with a horribly offensive odor.

name: nipper
description: A crustacean's claw.

name: conch
description: The shell of a marine mollusk.

name: tentacle
description: A flexible, prehensile and boneless appendage.

name: sharp_scale
description: A scale that is much sharper than a razor.

name: crab_shell
description: A hard crab shell that smells horrible.

name: clam_shell
description: A hard shell taken from a dead clam.

name: clam_flesh
description: Muscular and fatty clam tissue that can be cooked in all sorts of ways.

name: turtle_shell
description: A hard shell that obviously failed to protect a turtle.

name: heroic_emblem
description: An emblem given to an Orc Warrior that is proof of his heroism.

name: gold
description: A valuable metal in bullion form. It's used to make coins, jewelry and gaudy false teeth.

name: alcohol
description: This colorless liquid is the secret behind the addictiveness of beers and wine. 200 Proof.

name: detrimindexta
description: A liquid with unique scientific properties. It's difficult to mix in water and is normally diluted in a solution.

name: karvodailnirol
description: A liquid with interesting characteristics and many possible applications.

name: counteragent
description: A mixture of chemical substances that can only be produced by geniuses.

name: mixture
description: A special compound that has applications that can only be understood by keen minds schooled in science.

name: scarlet_dyestuffs
description: Red colored dye that is made from grinded Red Herbs.

name: lemon_dyestuffs
description: Yellow colored dye that is made out of ground Yellow Herbs.

name: cobalt_blue_dyestuffs
description: Blue colored dye that is made from ground Blue Herbs.

name: green_dyestuffs
description: Green colored dye that is made out of ground Green Herbs.

name: orange_dyestuffs
description: Orange colored dye that was made from grinding Red and Yellow Herbs together.

name: violet_dyestuffs
description: Purpled colored dye that is made by grinding Blue and Red Herbs.

name: white_dyestuffs
description: White colored dye that is made out of grinded White Herbs.

name: black_dyestuffs
description: Black colored dye made from various grinded herbs.

name: oridecon
description: Pure Oridecon metal. Widely known as the Blessed Metal, it can increase the damage of weapons once welded to them. Used to temper Level 3 and 4 weapons.

name: elunium
description: A very light, non-toxic metal used for refining and toughening Armor.

name: anvil
description: A smithing tool on which heated metals are placed so that they can be shaped by hammering. Used in the making of common products.

name: oridecon_anvil
description: An anvil, made of pure Oridecon, that's used to make quality goods.

name: golden_anvil
description: An anvil, made of pure Gold, that's used in the manufacture of high quality products.

name: emperium_anvil
description: An anvil, made of pure Emperium, that's used to manufacture products of the highest quality.

name: red_blood
description: A vivid red ore that glows from inside with an orange yellow light. Possesses the Fire property and can form the enchanted stone, Flame Heart, when refined.

name: crystal_blue
description: A sky colored ore that glows with the light of the deep ocean depths. Possesses the Water property and forms the enchanted stone, Mystic Frozen, when refined.

name: wind_of_verdure

name: green_live

name: flame_heart

name: mystic_frozen
description: A light blue, crystal stone enchanted with the Water property.

name: rough_wind
description: A pale green, lightning bolt shaped stone imbued with the Wind property.

name: great_nature
description: A citrus colored, bud shaped stone enchanted with the Earth property.

name: iron
description: Malleable, silver-white metal that's very light weight and easy to temper. Commonly used to create arms and other goods.

name: steel
description: An iron and carbon alloy known for its structural durability and usually used in the crafting of high-quality arms.

name: star_crumb
description: A small stellar crystal, fallen from the heavens, which can be used to craft strengthened weapons.

name: star_dust
description: Stardust which can form a Star Crumb after being refined.

name: iron_ore
description: An impure ore that forms Iron after being refined.

name: coal
description: A black mineral substance that can form Steel once it is combined with Iron.

name: chivalry_emblem

name: hammer_of_blacksmith

name: old_magicbook

name: necklace_of_wisdom

name: necklace_of_oblivion
description: A necklace given from a master once one earns the honor of joining the Assassin Guild.

name: hand_of_god
description: A figure of a hand that contains great religious symbolism.

name: phracon
description: A metal that can be used to strengthen and upgrade Level 1 Weapons.

name: emveretarcon
description: A metal that can be used to strengthen and upgrade Level 2 Weapons.

name: frill
description: Some skin from the neck of a lizard which lives in the desert.

name: rainbow_shell
description: A bug shell that reflects the colors of the rainbow.

name: ant_jaw
description: A tough, sharp jaw from an ant.

name: tongue
description: A tongue cut from a Monster. It has a disgusting coating of sticky saliva.

name: rat_tail
description: A thin rat's tail.

name: mole_whiskers
description: Whiskers from a mole.

name: mole_claw
description: A mole's claw that is sturdy enough to dig into the ground.

name: trunk
description: A woody stem from a tree that's useful for lumber.

name: black_hair
description: Lustrous, well brushed hair cut from some virgin.

name: dokebi_horn
description: Horns from a Dokebi which are rumored to bring great fortune to their owner.

name: nine_tails
description: A set of tails that used to belong to a Nine Tail fox. But not anymore, apparently.

name: fish_tail
description: A tail severed from a fish monster.

name: squid_ink
description: Bottled black fluid from Marse the squid that seems to have failed its purpose of providing self defense.

name: cobweb
description: A sticky spider's web made of surprisingly strong threadlike fibers.

name: acorn
description: A tough, woody shelled nut from an oak tree.

name: porcupine_quill
description: Sharp, hollow quills which used to cover and protect some porcupine.

name: mane
description: Bristly, tough hair cut from a wild boar.

name: tiger_skin
description: A tiger's hide that's soft, furry, nice and feral.

name: tiger_s_footskin
description: A tiger's paw that's widely known to the elderly as the King of Invigorators.

name: mantis_scythe
description: A sharp, front limb severed from a Mantis.

name: maneater_blossom
description: A carnivorous flower with a digestive system very much like the humans.

name: maneater_root
description: Roots, which resemble human legs, that almost look capable of walking.

name: blue_hair
description: Hair cut from a Kobold that appears bristly but is actually downy soft.

name: dragon_canine
description: A dragon's cuspid that is sharp enough to pierce through dragon scales.

name: dragon_scale
description: An iridescent dragon's scale that is tough enough to protect from weather and most forms of harm.

name: dragon_tail
description: A tail cut off from a dragon that, sadly, will never grow back.

name: little_evil_horn
description: Horns sliced off the head of a little demon.

name: little_evil_wing
description: Wings from a little demon which look like those of a small bat.

name: elder_pixie_s_moustache
description: A moustache shaved off an old dwarf that has somehow maintained its entire shape and form.

name: lantern
description: A carriable case with glass panes that allow some contained light to illuminate dark areas.

name: bug_leg
description: A hind leg that has been cut from a bug.

name: orc_claw
description: A thick, sharpened fingernail from an Orc.

name: zenorc_s_fang
description: A cuspid pulled out of a cursed Orc's mouth.

name: cultish_masque
description: A ceremonial mask used by an ancient shaman.

name: scorpion_nipper
description: A sharp forelimb claw removed from a scorpion.

name: dead_medusa
description: A Medusa's head that, naturally, looks pretty sad and depressed.

name: horrendous_hair
description: Some of Medusa's hair, which is essentially just a bunch of snakes.

name: skirt_of_virgin
description: A traditional skirt that symbolizes virginity.

name: tendon

name: detonator
description: A weird organic clump that seems to be the brain for a Marine Sphere monster.

name: single_cell
description: A single, functioning cell taken from some monster.

name: ancient_tooth

name: ancient_lips
description: A set of fat lips cut from a giant deep sea fish.

name: earthworm_peeling
description: A shed skin peeling from an earthworm.

name: grit
description: A cubic grain of sand that brightly sparkles.

name: moth_dust
description: Bottled powder from the wings of a moth.

name: moth_wings
description: A set of wings cut from a moth.

name: fabric
description: A piece of nearly transparent fabric.

name: golden_hair
description: A beautiful lock of golden human hair.

name: witch_starsand
description: A bottle of sand that sparkles like the stars and is usually found in witch broom bristles.

name: jack_o_pumpkin
description: A pumpkin with a carved, spooky face.

name: fang
description: A sharp cuspid yanked from some monster's mouth.

name: reins
description: Ring placed into a horse's pierced nose to help steer it in a certain direction.

name: trap
description: Necessary item for Trap related skills.

name: fine_grained_trunk
description: A tree trunk of wood with an excellent grain.

name: solid_trunk
description: A tree trunk of wood that is nice and solid.

name: barren_trunk
description: A tree trunk of wood that is pretty low quality.

name: kafra_pass
description: A special, one-time use ticket that allows you to use any one of the Kafra Services free of charge.

name: morroc_solution
description: A test tube containing the Morroc solution.

name: payon_solution
description: A test tube containing the Payon solution.

name: empty_test_tube
description: An empty test tube that can be used to contain some kind of solution.

name: short_daenggie
description: A short lock of braided hair.

name: needle_of_alarm
description: A set of hands taken from the face of a clock.

name: round_shell
description: A round shell that looks like it has been rolled up.

name: worn_out_page
description: A worn, tattered page torn from an old book.

name: manacles
description: Wrist restraints that are usually used on prisoners.

name: worn_out_prison_uniform
description: An old, used prison uniform.

name: arrow
description: A common arrow.

name: silver_arrow
description: An arrow tipped with a silver point enchanted with the power of holiness.

name: fire_arrow
description: A flaming arrow that will inflict Fire property damage.

name: steel_arrow
description: An arrow constructed from hardened steel.

name: crystal_arrow
description: An arrow made of blue crystal imbued with the power of Water.

name: arrow_of_wind
description: An arrow enchanted by the power of the Wind.

name: stone_arrow
description: An arrow made of stone imbued with the power of Earth.

name: immaterial_arrow
description: A shining arrow that doesn't have a discernable shape.

name: stun_arrow
description: A thick, heavy arrow.

name: frozen_arrow
description: An arrow enchanted with the power of ice.

name: flash_arrow
description: An arrow that explodes with a flash of light upon impact.

name: cursed_arrow
description: An arrow enchanted with curse magic.

name: rusty_arrow
description: An old, rusty arrow.

name: poison_arrow
description: An arrow whose tip has been dipped in lethal poison.

name: sharp_arrow
description: An arrow with topped with a serrated blade.

description: A very powerful arrow made out of Oridecon.

name: arrow_of_counter_evil

name: arrow_of_shadow
description: An arrow imbued with the power of darkness.

name: sleep_arrow
description: An arrow that can render targets unconscious.

name: mute_arrow

name: iron_arrow
description: Forged out of iron, this arrow will inflict more damage than one crafted of wood.

name: venom_knife
description: A throwing knife laced with toxin that can inflict the Poison effect to enemies.

name: holy_arrow
description: A metal arrow blessed with holy water.

description: Strong and rough arrows ideal for hunting large animals.

name: light_of_el_dicastes

name: brownie_point

name: ashes_of_darkness
description: A dark ash imbued with mysterious magical power and darkness.

name: essence_of_fire
description: An essence of fire that is holding the pure spirit of Thor, god of thunder. It has the mysterious force to restrain vices and darkness.

name: token_of_apostle
description: A token that certifies the aspiration of its owner to obey all evil; and proves a member of the diabolists.

name: pendant_of_spirit
description: A pendant that was been used to confine wandered souls from unknown places.

name: cursed_baphomet_doll
description: A Doll imbued with Baphomet's curse. It seems to be compounded with something.

name: hoe
description: A gardening tool, but be careful! This could also be used as a fearful weapon.

name: fur
description: Beautiful Silver colored fur that can be sold to merchant NPCs at a high price.

name: peaked_hat
description: A small, red colored peaked hat that can be sold to merchant NPCs at a high price.

name: hard_skin
description: Gray colored Hard Skin. Too hard that it seems impossible to be even processed. It can be sold to merchant NPC at a high price.

name: mystic_horn
description: Beautiful long, white colored horn with the very strong magical power. It can be sold to merchant NPC at a high price.

name: glittering_paper_fake
description: My heart's pounding! Where is the treasure paper?

name: glittering_paper_real
description: You're lucky! Run to Pierre before too late!

name: horn_of_hillslion
description: A hard horn that grows on Hilsrion's head.

name: horn_of_tendrilion
description: A hard horn that grows on Tendrilion's head.

name: mysterious_part
description: A very worn-out piece of some part or a machine.

name: neat_report
description: A nicely sorted document file. A small thank you note is attached on the bottom of the file.

name: piece_of_fish
description: A piece of raw fish.

name: strong_vine
description: A strong looking vine. Looks useful for various uses.

name: new_clothing_dye_coupon
description: If you give this coupon to the NPC, she will dye your costume.

name: original_clothing_dye_coupon
description: If you give this coupon to the NPC, she will dye your costume to its original color.

name: marlin

name: dragon_s_mane

name: bazett_s_order

name: crystalized_teardrop

name: stone_fragment

name: spiritual_crystal_blue

name: spiritual_crystal_red
description: Brightly shining jewel of a very small size. Some of the rare ones are blessed by fairies.

name: refined_bradium

name: flavored_alcohol

description: A cloud of edible smoke.

name: big_cell

name: surface_paint
description: A paint with a vivid and intense color. Exclusively for ground graffiti.

name: wolf_flute

name: lucky_box

name: happy_box
description: The joyful color of yellow makes you feel strangely happy. Every time you think about opening it you resist the temptation. Perhaps a professional "Gift Opener" could be of assistance.

name: antidote
description: An antidote for Guillotine Cross only.

name: regrettable_tears
description: A heartbreaking tear for others. Sometimes a miracle happens by this tear.

name: vulcan_bullet
description: A bullet which is used for skills.

name: magic_gear_fuel

name: liquid_condensed_bullet
description: A bullet which effuses cold air.

name: mansion_key

name: giant_bradium_fragment
description: A huge piece of Bradium. You can feel the mysterious power.

name: glittering_crystal

name: broken_horn_pipe
description: A golden shining piece. It might have once been a piece of a beautiful horn pipe.

name: a_report_to_be_approved

name: festa_gold_medal

name: monkey_wrench
description: A consumable item used for destroying a fixed installed fort.

name: slotting_advertisement
description: Come visit us in Payon as we amaze you with our Brand new service of adding a Card slot to normal equipment! You've never seen something so amazing; Watch as Troy adds a slot with his eyes closed, it is an adventure for the whole family!

name: spell_book_fire_bolt

description: An essential magic book for the Warlock skill Reading Spellbook. Magic Power can be drawn out by reading this book. It's written about Earth Property magic, Earth Strain.

description: An essential magic book for the Warlock skill Reading Spellbook. Magic Power can be drawn out by reading this book. It's written about Fire Property magic, Crimson Rock.

name: spell_book_drain_life
description: An essential magic book for the Warlock skill Reading Spellbook. Magic Power can be drawn out by reading this book. It's written about Neutral Property magic, Drain Life.

name: thorn_plant_seed
description: Be careful of the sharp thorns that surround this seed.

name: blood_sucker_plant_seed
description: An unpleasant seed that is used for reddish fruits, it looks as if blood is inside of it.

name: bomb_mushroom_spore
description: A purplish spore. When it's touched, a purple dust is expelled that you need to be careful of.

name: explosive_powder
description: A black powder that explodes when heated. It's more explosive than gunpowder.

name: smoke_powder
description: A snow-white powder. It's so light that it  stays in the air for a long time. Do not breathe it in or it can be fatal.

name: tear_gas
description: Gas that stimulates the eyes and nose. When exposed to this gas, do not rub your eyes. Cleanse with clear water immediately.

name: oil_bottle
description: A bottle filled with inedible oil.

name: mandragora_flowerpot
description: A Mandragora flowerpot used for an experiment. Fragile. Never pull out recklessly.

name: eden_group_mark
description: A mark that certifies a member of the Eden Group. It's made to be very portable

name: mysterious_dyestuffs
description: Various colors are mixed into this mysterious dye. It is a primary ingredient for dying certain headgears.

name: mystic_hydra_ball
description: A ball with mysterious power.

name: shining_beads
description: Small purity beads.

name: carnium
description: One of the hardest metals on the Rune Midgard continent. It has a extraordinary degree of strength but it's too solid to be easily refined.

name: bradium
description: One of the hardest metals found in the Ash Vacuum. It was difficult to refine because of it's high density, but recent experiments have made it possible to use it in weapon strengthening.

name: hd_carnium
description: A high-density Carnium used in upgrading armor.This Carnium's density guarantees that your armor will NOT break when attempting to upgrade and if the upgrade attempt fails, it will only downgrade 1 level instead of 3 like a normal Carnium.

name: hd_bradium
description: A high-density Bradium used in upgrading weapons.This Bradium's density guarantees that your weapon will NOT break when attempting to upgrade and if the upgrade attempt fails, it will only downgrade 1 level instead of 3 like a normal Bradium.

name: safe_to_7_weapon_certificate
description: Take this certificate, 1 Oridecon and an upgradable Weapon to Mighty Hammer in the Eden Group.  If he fails on the upgrade when the item is +4, +5, or +6 the item will not break and it will stay at its current upgrade level.

name: safe_to_7_body_armor_certificate
description: Take this certificate, 1 Elunium and an upgradable Shield, Shoes, Clothing, or Armor to Mighty Hammer in the Eden Group.  If he fails on the upgrade when the item is +4, +5, or +6 the item will not break and it will stay at its current upgrade level.

name: safe_to_7_headgear_certificate
description: Take this certificate, 1 Elunium and an upgradable Headgear to Mighty Hammer in the Eden Group.  If he fails on the upgrade when the item is +4, +5, or +6 the item will not break and it will stay at its current upgrade level.

name: guarana_fruit
description: The most famous fruit from Brasilis. This fruit has natural properties that boost concentration and speed.

name: hd_oridecon
description: High Density Oridecon that has been buried deep underground. Used as a material to strengthen weapons currently from refine levels 7 through 9. This item's density ensures that refine attempts will not break the weapon and if the attempt fails it will only downgrade by 1.

name: hd_elunium
description: High Density Elunium that has been buried deep underground. Used as a material to strengthen armor currently from refine levels 7 through 9. This item's density ensures that refine attempts will not break the weapon and if the attempt fails it will only downgrade by 1.

name: midgard_coin
description: A coin given in exchange for old RWC Groove Packs. Bring this to the RWC Groove Recycler on the second floor of Eden Group to redeem for special items. These must be redeemed by October 4, 2011 on which date they will be deleted.

name: wps_point_token
description: A token that can be exchanged for cash items.

name: gun_powder
description: Dangerous powder which has a dark color. It can be used to make a bomb. Handle with care!

name: black_powder
description: Matte black-colored very fine powder. Be careful with it or it will blow up.

name: yellow_powder
description: Yellow powder with no smell or taste. Burns with blue sparks when heated.

name: white_powder
description: A salty white powder with no smell.

name: melange_pot
description: A pot which can be used as a shaker.

name: savage_meat
description: The most delicious part of a Savage.

name: cooking_skewer
description: Long iron skewer for barbecue dishes.

name: black_charcoal
description: A kind of fuel made of wood. It adds great taste to food.

name: blood_of_wolf

name: cold_ice

name: beef_head
description: Well roasted pressed meat.

name: large_cookpot

name: ice_piece
description: A fragment of crushed ice.

name: ice_crystal
description: A transparent ice crystal.

name: comodo_tropical_fruit
description: The most common fruit on Comodo Island. It has a sour and sweet flavor.

name: drosera_tentacle
description: A sticky Drosera tentacle which is widely grown in Arunafeltz. It's hard to collect because of its stickiness.

name: petite_s_tail
description: Tail off a Petite. It'll grow back again after it's cut.

name: fine_noodle
description: A thin white noodle. It's a summer delicacy.

name: cool_gravy
